Welcome to Naptec

Quality home care for your loved ones

Compassionate, reliable care that helps your loved one stay safe, comfortable, and independent in the place they know best.

Book appointment

Compassionate Care, Delivered Daily|

Trusted Support for Independent Living|

Personalized Home Care for Every Family|

Dedicated to Dignity, Comfort & Care|

Compassionate Care, Delivered Daily|

Dedicated to Dignity, Comfort & Care|

About us

Caring for Your Loved Ones, Like Family

At Naptec, we believe home care should feel personal, respectful, and reassuring. Our team takes the time to understand each client's routines, preferences, and needs — so support always feels thoughtful, never rushed.

Our Value:

  • Compassion
  • Integrity
  • Respect
  • Compassion
  • Integrity
  • Respect
Learn more

Popular Services

Home Help & Housekeeping

Practical support around the home — from light housekeeping and meal preparation to errands — so daily life stays comfortable and manageable.

Discover more

Personal Care

With Naptec you can feel confident that our caregivers will assist with your care and support needs discreetly and with dignity.

Discover more

Overnight Care

Reassuring support through the night so your loved one feels safe at home — and family can rest knowing a trusted Naptec caregiver is there when needed.

Discover more

Why us?

Finding the perfect match

At Naptec, care is more than a service — it's a relationship. We tailor every care plan to the individual, matching clients with caregivers who share their values, ensuring every visit brings connection, comfort, and quality care. Every visit lasts at least an hour, creating space for genuine connection and meaningful moments.

Discover more

Our services

Services

01

Overnight Care

Reassuring support through the night so your loved one feels safe at home — and family can rest knowing a trusted Naptec caregiver is there when needed.

Learn more
03

Companionship

Friendly company and conversation at home — for outings, appointments, or simply sharing time together, so your loved one stays connected and never feels alone.

Learn more
